assertions.description: The SubApps interface binds to Window as window.subApps inside a secure, isolated context (IWA).
window.subApps.add() exists — installs a batch of sub apps from install paths.
window.subApps.remove() exists — uninstalls sub apps by ManifestId.
window.subApps.list() exists — returns the ManifestId-keyed inventory of installed sub apps.
The interface is [SecureContext]: on a non-secure context window.subApps must be absent (on a secure context either state is spec-legal, since IsolatedContext also gates it).
When bound, list() resolves to a record (object, not an array) keyed by ManifestId, per SubAppsListResult.
assertions.test: (async()=>{ if (typeof window.subApps?.list !== 'function') return false; const r = await window.subApps.list(); return r !== null && typeof r === 'object' && !Array.isArray(r); })()

assertions.description: When bound, add() rejects with TypeError for an install path that does not start with '/' (batch-level validation).
assertions.test: (async()=>{ if (typeof window.subApps?.add !== 'function') return false; try { await window.subApps.add(['mail/index.html']); return false; } catch (e) { return !!e && e.name === 'TypeError'; } })()
